name: Microsoft Teams (Docker)
description: Connect to Microsoft Teams via Docker. Read channel messages, start and reply to threads, mention members, and list team members through an Azure AD (MS Entra ID) bot application.

inputs.label: Teams App ID
inputs.description: UUID for your MS Entra ID (Azure AD) application (client) ID used by the Teams bot.

obtain.instructions:
1. Open the Azure Portal > Microsoft Entra ID > App registrations
2. Register (or open) your bot application
3. Copy the Application (client) ID from the Overview page

inputs.label: Teams App Password (Client Secret)
inputs.description: Client secret generated for your MS Entra ID application registration.

obtain.instructions:
1. Open the Azure Portal > Microsoft Entra ID > App registrations > your app
2. Go to Certificates & secrets > Client secrets
3. Create a new client secret and copy its Value (shown only once)

inputs.label: Teams App Type
inputs.description: Tenancy model of the Entra ID application: SingleTenant or MultiTenant.

inputs.label: Teams App Tenant ID
inputs.description: Tenant UUID for your Microsoft Entra ID directory. Required when using a SingleTenant app type.

obtain.instructions:
1. Open the Azure Portal > Microsoft Entra ID > Overview
2. Copy the Tenant ID (Directory ID)

inputs.label: Team ID
inputs.description: MS Teams Group ID or Team ID. Found in the channel URL as the groupId parameter (https://teams.microsoft.com/l/channel/<TEAMS_CHANNEL_ID>/<name>?groupId=<TEAM_ID>&tenantId=<TEAMS_APP_TENANT_ID>).

obtain.instructions:
1. Open the target channel in Microsoft Teams
2. Click the channel ... menu > Get link to channel
3. Copy the groupId value from the URL

inputs.label: Teams Channel ID
inputs.description: MS Teams Channel ID with URL-escaped characters. Found in the channel link URL.

obtain.instructions:
1. Open the target channel in Microsoft Teams
2. Click the channel ... menu > Get link to channel
3. Copy the channel ID segment from the URL (keep the URL-escaped characters)

auth.instructions: Register an Azure AD (Microsoft Entra ID) application, create a client secret, and add the bot to your Teams channel. See https://github.com/InditexTech/mcp-teams-server/blob/master/doc/MS-Teams-setup.md
